# teams project config remove

Remove Agents Toolkit configuration from the current project

## Usage

```
teams project config remove <name> [options]
```

## Arguments

| Argument | Description | Required |
|----------|-------------|----------|
| `name` | Config name (e.g. atk.basic, atk.oauth, atk.embed) | Yes |

## Options

| Flag | Description |
|------|-------------|
| `--json` | [OPTIONAL] Output as JSON |
<!-- AUTOGENERATED:END -->
